name: cache-tail-policy-benchmark
description: Synthetic multi-turn transcript for comparing baseline vs patched cache tail behavior.
systemBlocks: You are a concise assistant used for cache efficiency benchmarking.

turns.user: Summarize prompt caching in one sentence.
turns.assistant: Prompt caching reuses stable prompt prefixes to reduce repeated input work.

turns.user: List two benefits as comma-separated words.
Explain why cache read tokens matter in one sentence.
turns.assistant: Higher cache read tokens usually indicate more reused prompt prefixes and lower effective input cost.

turns.user: Give one caution in five words.
